criteria.metric: TDZ ReferenceErrors on CLI cold start + both module load orders
criteria.threshold: 0 errors; --help/--version exit 0; import(critic-deep)-first AND import(decomposer-deep)-first both succeed; full vitest run green
criteria.window: all checks in a single post-build run
criteria.verificationSource: npm run build; node dist/cli/index.js <cmd>; node -e import() both orders; npx vitest run

action: Moved init-time budget constants (DEEP_MAX_TOTAL_CALLS, DEEP_EXPAND_MAX_RETRIES, DEEP_PLAN_MAX_RETRIES) into new dependency-free leaf src/fleet/decomposer-deep-constants.ts; decomposer-deep.ts imports+re-exports them; critic-deep.ts imports the two init-time ones from the leaf. Added regression test src/fleet/decomposer-deep-load-order.test.ts (in-process value guard + native-ESM child-process load-order guard).
inverse: git checkout -- src/fleet/critic-deep.ts src/fleet/decomposer-deep.ts && git rm src/fleet/decomposer-deep-constants.ts src/fleet/decomposer-deep-load-order.test.ts

evidence: tsc clean (exit 0); decomposer-deep-first -> OK (DEEP_MAX_TOTAL_CALLS=4); critic-deep-first -> OK (DEEP_CRITIQUE_MAX_TOTAL_CALLS=8); node dist/cli/index.js --version -> 0.17.1; --help -> 0 TDZ lines; full suite 2797 passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed; new regression test 2/2 pass (native-ESM guard incl.).
